title: lathyrus pannonicus var. multijugus
intro: Lathyrus pannonicus var. multijugus, also known as the Hungarian lathyrus or grass pea, is a flowering plant species within the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal medicine, Lathyrus pannonicus var. multijugus is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
